description: I-495 eastbound beltway cruise, 300 s, dense flowing traffic. Speed profile averages ~24 m/s (clip covers ~4.5 mi in 300 s); one 4 s GPS dropout at t=180 exercises the hold-on-stale path. Camera block fitted by calibration/auto_horizon.py (633 detections, MAD 18 px; fx assumes 100 deg HFOV).
